Saetru thanneeril

Moongil kaadugale

Thoorach sigarangalil

Uppu kadalodu megam

Uppu thanneerai megam

Mazhayil vilundhaalum

Sooriyan polave maareno
En jothiyil ulagai aaleno.

Janam maranam ariyaa vannam
Naanum mazhai thuli aaveno ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Moongil Kaadugale?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, reflecting the beauty of nature and emotions intertwined.

How does Samurai relate to this song?

The song is featured in the movie Samurai, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer of Moongil Kaadugale?

The song is sung by the talented Hariharan, known for his soulful renditions.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Moongil Kaadugale was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, adding a unique touch to the melody.

When was Moongil Kaadugale released?

The song was released on July 12, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Moongil Kaadugale, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and yearning, beautifully portrayed through the lyrics by Vairamuthu. The song serves as a poignant backdrop in the movie Samurai, enhancing the romantic storyline. Hariharan's soulful voice brings the lyrics to life, evoking a sense of nostalgia and longing. The soothing melody invites listeners to reflect on their own experiences of love, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Moongil Kaadugale from the Samurai movie is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Hariharan's soulful voice and Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. The collaboration with Harrish Jeyaraj's enchanting music makes it a timeless classic that you won't want to miss.
stanzaMeanings: The bamboo forest brings songs that awaken the mind, in the coolness of the morning, knowledge flows like water.
Born in the embrace of nature, my heart has lost its way. I have come as a human, needing to soar, wandering around, flying and drifting.
The bamboo forest brings songs that awaken the mind, in the coolness of the morning, knowledge flows like water.
In the water that flows, the red lotus blooms. In the heart that connects, life blossoms.
Even if there are differences, the pain of separation does not exist. On the river of unity, the trees bloom with joy.
Will the lotus flower change? Can I see the essence of life here? Will I also change in my human birth?
Will the white dew drop fall in the wind?

The bamboo forest brings songs that awaken the mind, in the coolness of the morning, knowledge flows like water. Even if the salty sea becomes a cloud, the salty water can still become a cloud, just for a moment.
Even if it rains, the sun will not disappear. The moonlight will not stop shining.
Will I also change like the clouds? Will I see the qualities of truth?
Will I change like the sun? Will I rule the world with my light?
I do not know life and death, will I also become a raindrop?
The bamboo forest brings songs that awaken the mind, in the coolness of the morning, knowledge flows like water.
Born in the embrace of nature, my heart has lost its way. I have come as a human, needing to soar, wandering around, flying and drifting.
